svg.title: Shingleback flight state machine
svg.desc: Flow diagram showing all flight states from idle through land, with transition conditions and safety interlocks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens in the IDLE state?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the PAD state?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the BOOST state?')
sendPrompt('What are the pyro safety interlocks during boost?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the COAST state?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the DROGUE state?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the PARAFOIL state?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the LAND state?')
